operating_ranges.evidence: Front roller bearing: Zero to 3μm tight
Rear roller bearing: Slight clearance (-2 to -5μm)
NN30 X-quantity ranges from 0.4 to 69 cc/brg depending on bore size
NN39 X-quantity ranges from 4.5 to 75 cc/brg depending on bore size
NN49 X-quantity ranges from 5.4 to 44 cc/brg depending on bore size
N10 X-quantity ranges from 0.4 to 12.9 cc/brg depending on bore size
Typically 11-14% increase in speed with TB cages

degradation_mechanisms.rate_description: peak life occurs at approximately zero clearance
degradation_mechanisms.evidence: Graph shows life ratio from -0.008mm to +0.008mm radial clearance with peak life at zero clearance
grease discolouration due to wear on brass cage

degradation_mechanisms.rate_description: wear found in Brass cage bearings after 200 hours compared to 300 hours for PPS material
degradation_mechanisms.evidence: wear could be found in the Brass cage bearings after 200 hours compared to 300 hours for the PPS material of the TB cage

fault_conditions.name: flaking_one_side_raceway
fault_conditions.description: Flaking on one side of the raceway of radial bearing
fault_conditions.symptoms: abnormal axial load (sliding failure of free-side bearing)
fault_conditions.evidence: Flaking on one side of the raceway of radial bearing caused by abnormal axial load

fault_conditions.name: scoring_raceway_rolling_surface
fault_conditions.description: Scoring or smearing between raceway and rolling surface
fault_conditions.symptoms: inadequate initial lubrication, excessively hard grease, high acceleration when starting
fault_conditions.evidence: Scoring or smearing between raceway and rolling surface due to inadequate initial lubrication

fault_conditions.name: rib_scoring
fault_conditions.description: Scoring or smearing between the end face of the rollers and guide rib
fault_conditions.symptoms: inadequate lubrication, incorrect mounting and large axial load
fault_conditions.evidence: Scoring or smearing between the end face of the rollers and guide rib

fault_conditions.name: excessive_preload
fault_conditions.description: Excessive bearing preload leading to seizure
fault_conditions.symptoms: high bearing running temperature and seizure
fault_conditions.evidence: Excessive preload (negative radial clearance) can result in high bearing running temperature and seizure

fault_conditions.name: cage_noise
fault_conditions.description: Cage noise in grease lubricated bearings
fault_conditions.symptoms: friction between ball surface and cage guide surface, particularly in cold conditions
fault_conditions.evidence: cage noise can occur in grease lubricated bearings due to friction between the ball surface and the cage guide surface

maintenance_actions.name: grease_running_in
maintenance_actions.what_it_resets: grease distribution and bearing temperature stability
maintenance_actions.evidence: Do not operate bearings at full spindle speed when bearings are first installed. It is necessary to run the grease in

maintenance_actions.name: radial_clearance_adjustment
maintenance_actions.what_it_resets: bearing preload and clearance to optimal values
maintenance_actions.evidence: Clearance/preload easily changed in-situ by pushing bearing up 1:12 taper

maintenance_actions.name: spacer_grinding
maintenance_actions.what_it_resets: mounted radial internal clearance to target values
maintenance_actions.evidence: Grind spacer to specific width after setting radial internal clearance and before final mounting

assumptions.statement: Grease quantities are based on 10% of internal free space for cylindrical roller bearings
assumptions.reason: Standard specified in manual for cylindrical roller bearing lubrication

assumptions.statement: Target preload of 2μm for tool-side and 5μm clearance for rear-side are typical values
assumptions.reason: Manual states these as usual targets but notes they depend on OEM specs and operating conditions

assumptions.statement: TB cage speed improvement applies to NN30xx series bearings
assumptions.reason: Speed comparison data shown specifically for NN3022 bearing with TB vs MB cage
